assert_Phases.description: Test assertion for Phases from IngestScanner spec

assert_ValidPhase.description: Test assertion for ValidPhase from IngestScanner spec

assert_NoLLMCalls.description: Test assertion for NoLLMCalls from IngestScanner spec

assert_NoSubprocessCalls.description: Test assertion for NoSubprocessCalls from IngestScanner spec

assert_BoundedExecution.description: Test assertion for BoundedExecution from IngestScanner spec

assert_UploadOrdering.description: Test assertion for UploadOrdering from IngestScanner spec

assert_CompletionRequiresAll.condition:
phase = "Finished" implies
        (crawldb_uploaded and dag_json_uploaded and
         fn_records_written and resource_nodes_written and
         llm_called = FALSE and subprocess_called = FALSE)
assert_CompletionRequiresAll.message:
Assertion failed: CompletionRequiresAll — phase = "Finished" =>
        (crawldb_uploaded /\ dag_json_uploaded /\
         fn_records_written /\ resource_nodes...
assert_CompletionRequiresAll.description: Test assertion for CompletionRequiresAll from IngestScanner spec

assert_PureExecution.description: Test assertion for PureExecution from IngestScanner spec

assert_SafePhaseOrder.condition:
(resource_nodes_written implies dag_loaded) and
    (crawldb_uploaded       implies fn_records_written) and
    (dag_json_uploaded      implies resource_nodes_written)
assert_SafePhaseOrder.description: Test assertion for SafePhaseOrder from IngestScanner spec
